assertions.title: Packaging Setup replaces unexplained BOM jargon

steps.action: Search workflow/inventory/frontend-handoff docs for BOM and Packaging Setup wording
steps.expected: Operator-facing docs use Packaging Setup / Rules wording and do not retain unexplained BOM jargon.
steps.observed: `docs_packaging_summary.json` shows zero `BOM` matches in `docs/workflows/manufacturing-and-packaging.md`, `docs/endpoint-inventory.md`, and `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md`, while each file contains Packaging Setup / Rules wording tied to `/api/v1/factory/packaging-mappings`.

steps.action: Review runtime-facing error text coverage in tests
steps.expected: Fail-closed pack/setup messaging should direct users back to Packaging Setup / Rules.
steps.observed: `BulkPackingManualPackagingRegressionIT.packagingSetupRulesAreRequired` and `PackagingMaterialServiceTest.consumePackagingMaterial_throwsWhenPackagingSetupMissing` both assert user-facing messages containing `Packaging Setup is required for size 1L` and `Packaging Rule`.

steps.action: Inspect packaging mapping schemas and paths in openapi.json
steps.expected: The contract explicitly models packaging size, packaging material, units-per-pack, optional carton size, optional liters-per-unit, and active status.
steps.observed: `openapi_packaging_contract.json` shows `PackagingSizeMappingRequest` requires `packagingSize`, `rawMaterialId`, and `unitsPerPack`, with optional `cartonSize` and `litersPerUnit`; `PackagingSizeMappingDto` exposes `active` plus mapping/material identity fields.

steps.expected: Tests reject blank size, invalid/non-packaging materials, and duplicate mappings while keeping lifecycle explicit.

assertions.title: Packaging rule permissions and lifecycle are correct

steps.action: GET /api/v1/factory/packaging-mappings and /active as admin and factory; POST /api/v1/factory/packaging-mappings as factory
steps.expected: Admin/factory users can inspect mappings, while write actions stay admin-only.
steps.observed: Both admin and factory list calls returned 200 (`Packaging setup rules` / `Active packaging setup rules`); a factory POST returned 403 with `AUTH_004 Access denied`.

steps.expected: Controller annotations enforce admin/factory reads and admin-only create/update/deactivate.
steps.observed: `PackagingMappingControllerSecurityContractTest` asserts `listMappings` and `listActiveMappings` require `hasAnyAuthority('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_FACTORY')`, while `createMapping`, `updateMapping`, and `deactivateMapping` require `hasAnyAuthority('ROLE_ADMIN')`.

steps.action: Inspect lifecycle separation coverage in PackagingMaterialServiceTest
steps.expected: Inactive rules stay in the full list but disappear from the active list.
steps.observed: `listMappingsAndListActiveMappings_keepFullAndActiveViewsSeparate` verifies the full list returns both active and inactive mappings, while the active list only returns active mappings; `deactivateMapping_marksMappingInactive` proves the dedicated lifecycle route flips active=false.

assertions.title: Missing packaging setup blocks pack with a setup-directed error

steps.action: Run negative packaging service tests for missing, inactive, invalid, and unusable setup
steps.expected: The pack-side consumption path fails closed with setup-directed validation errors instead of silently defaulting or zero-costing.
steps.observed: `PackagingMaterialServiceTest` passed targeted cases `consumePackagingMaterial_throwsWhenPackagingSetupMissing`, `consumePackagingMaterial_rejectsPackagingSetupWithoutInventoryAccount`, `consumePackagingMaterial_rejectsInactivePackagingMaterial`, `consumePackagingMaterial_rejectsPackagingSetupPointingToNonPackagingMaterial`, and `consumePackagingMaterial_wacNullAverageRejectsZeroCostWhenPackagingRequired`; each asserts messages such as `Packaging Setup is required for size 1L`, `Update Packaging Rules before packing`, and explicit unusable-material explanations.

steps.action: Run end-to-end pack regression without packaging rules
steps.expected: The surviving pack flow itself fails closed with the same setup-directed message.
steps.observed: `BulkPackingManualPackagingRegressionIT.packagingSetupRulesAreRequired` passes by asserting `bulkPackingService.pack(...)` throws `VALIDATION_INVALID_INPUT` with message fragments `Packaging Setup is required for size 1L` and `Packaging Rule`.

frictions.description: The seeded validation runtime exposes the packaging mapping read surfaces but starts with zero packaging rules, so runtime GETs could confirm permissions/messages but not demonstrate active-vs-full-list divergence with live data.
frictions.resolution: Used the deterministic service/security test coverage (`listMappingsAndListActiveMappings_keepFullAndActiveViewsSeparate`, `deactivateMapping_marksMappingInactive`) to verify lifecycle separation while keeping runtime proof for read permissions and admin-only writes.
